channel.title: Software on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Wednesday, 23 November 2022
item.description: Presentation of the fifth and seventh chapters of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “The COBYQA method.”

item.title: Monday, 14 November 2022
item.description: Presentation of the third chapter of my Ph.D. thesis. The title of this talk is “Development of the PDFO package.”
